# InstallEnterpriseApplicationCommand.Command

**Device Management Command**

The command to install an enterprise app on a device.

## Declaration

```swift
object InstallEnterpriseApplicationCommand.Command
```

## Objects

- **InstallEnterpriseApplicationCommand.Command.Configuration**: A dictionary that contains the configuration to install an enterprise app.
- **InstallEnterpriseApplicationCommand.Command.Manifest**: A dictionary that contains a manifest.
